Introduction

THE PERSON
BEHIND THE
BRAND

Over the years, I've worked across healthcare, SaaS, and fintech — building brands from the inside out. From awareness campaigns to product positioning, thought leadership, corporate comms, and campaign execution.

I've had the chance to work on some genuinely fun stuff: celebrity campaigns with Radhika Apte & Vikrant Massey, product launches at scale, and anti-fraud campaigns for banks and NBFCs. I experiment with tools like Nano Banana, HeyGen, and Midjourney.

Outside of work, I paint and take long nature walks. I mentor with Saturday Art Class — teaching art to school students. Always open to people and interesting work.

Experience

WHERE
I'VE BEEN

01 BETTERALT
Brand Manager
Brand strategy, positioning, research and GTM strategy across the US, UK, and India. End-to-end project management for 360° marketing campaigns. Executed PR launches and media outreach to boost brand visibility in the US.
GTM US Market PR
02 NPCI
Senior Brand Associate
Managed ₹50Cr annual marketing budget across digital, ATL, BTL, OOH, and PR. Strengthened brand identity for UPI and RuPay. Drove co-branded campaigns with international TPAP partners and led PMO-aligned product launch videos.
₹50Cr Budget Fintech International
03 IDFY
Assistant Brand Manager
Developed brand strategy and product positioning for domestic and international events. Led fraud detection and anti-phishing awareness campaigns. Managed CXO thought leadership and PR resulting in 85+ press articles and Forbes Asia 100 recognition.
B2B SaaS Brand Identity PR
04 MCAFFEINE
Senior Associate Brand Marketing
9 major product launches with Radhika Apte & Vikrant Massey. Managed photoshoots, product styling, and social content. Worked closely with Nykaa, Amazon, and Myntra on e-commerce launches.
D2C Celebrity E-commerce
